item.title: Nocturne 21 Volume One: Robot Boy
item.description: And so it begins...

item.title: Chapter One: The Red Rain
item.description: Chapter One: The Red Rain

item.title: Chapter Three: Snow Day
item.description: Chapter Three: Snow Day

item.title: The Kai Journals: Part 1
item.description: So, this is a four part bonus content I made during a hiatus. Chapter 4 takes has a time skip of a few months and these journal entries are meant to fill in the gap as well as give you a better understanding of what goes on inside Kai's head. You don't have to read them to understand chapter 4, but it does make for a meaningful experience. There's a lot of important things that happen, including new abilities and a trip that becomes a core memory for Kai. Hope you enjoy!

item.title: The Kai Journals: Part 2
item.description: The Kai Journals: Part 2

item.title: The Kai Journals: Part 3
item.description: The Kai Journals: Part 3

item.title: The Kai Journals: Part 4
item.description: The Kai Journals: Part 4

item.title: Chapter Four: The Stranger
item.description: Chapter Four: The Stranger

item.title: Page 122
item.description: Happy Halloween! Honestly, I can't express how stoked I am that ghost Kai ended up live on Halloween. This page was supposed to come out two months ago, but got pushed back for various life reasons and for the additional scene. I guess it worked out for the best!

item.title: The Kai Journals...er, Napkin: Part 5
item.description: The Kai Journals...er, Napkin: Part 5

item.title: Page 125
item.description: Where does an anxious, restless sleep-deprived teenager go once he's escaped? To high school of course! Wait...what?!

item.title: Page 126
item.description: Boy's not using that noggin of his, is he?

item.title: Page 127
item.description: Happy 20th anniversary, Nocturne 21! Been quite the amazing ride so far!

item.title: Page 128
item.description: Oof. Having a meltdown in front of your classmates. High school's probably not the best place for that, Kai.

item.title: Page 129
item.description: Poor Yosh. I'm not a runner either...

item.title: Page 130
item.description: See, folks? Nothing to worry about! Our boy's just taking a little coffee break!

item.title: Page 131
item.description: Maybe this wasn't actually about the coffee...

item.title: Page 132
item.description: Maybe you shouldn't follow him this time...

item.title: Page 134
item.description: This woulda been a real bad time to trip over his shoelaces...

item.title: Page 136
item.description: And we conclude this chapter with an over-the-top superhero landing and dramatic dust cloud reveal.

item.title: Chapter Five: The Voice From Below
item.description: Welcome back, friends! Sorry for the long hiatus! Good to be back at again. I hope you enjoy :)

item.title: Page 144
item.description: Here ya go! Have some fackin sunsets! Seriously though, this page kicked my ass. It took way longer than a normal page to color. I hope it was worth it!

item.title: Page 145
item.description: Uh-oh. Kuro's got you pegged, Kai.

item.title: Page 146
item.description: "Just one more minute..." famous last words, Kai.

item.title: Page 147
item.description: Things aren't looking good for our boy...

item.title: Page 148
item.description: Kuro isn't wasting any time. Go save your boi!

item.title: Page 150
item.description: What fresh new hell is this?!

item.title: Page 168
item.description: Hey folks! Sorry for the lack of update for a while. Had a big move and a lot of life changes since I last updated. I'm settled down now and looking to regularly post again. So keep an eye out for that and as always, thanks for reading!
